product_name: Vintage Green Ivy China Dinnerware Set (Service for ~8)
attributes: 1951 • Paden City Pottery Co. (USA) • Green Ivy Motif • Gold Trim • Coupe Shape
condition_notes: Large vintage green-ivy china set, ~40 pieces / service for about 8 with generous serving pieces: dinner plates, salad plates, coupe bowls & saucers, cups, creamer, gravy boat, covered sugar, covered casserole/serving dishes, a large vegetable bowl, and an oval platter. Cream/white coupe shape with green ivy leaves on tan vines and a gold/platinum rim. Backstamp: 'The Paden City Pottery Co., Made in U.S.A.' lighthouse mark, date code M-51 (1951) — confirmed maker, photographed (detail-backstamp.png). Condition: mostly clean; at least one serving piece (gravy/creamer) has a brown age-stain and light crazing — disclosed, see photos. Sold as a complete lot. LOCAL PICKUP ONLY — too heavy/fragile to ship economically.
